Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.

    Description

    Adds _type column for polymorphic beans.

    Creates a new builder.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.cycleHandling(ParquetCycleHandling value)
    Sets how to handle cyclic references during serialization.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.emitLogicalTypes(boolean value)
    Emits explicit logical-type discriminator metadata for ambiguous physical representations.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.maxRecursionDepth(int value)
    Sets the maximum expansion depth for self-referential (recursive) bean types.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.nativeLogicalTypes(boolean value)
    Emits binary-native logical types (DECIMAL, DATE, TIME, TIMESTAMP-micros) on write instead of the default string / TIMESTAMP-millis normalization.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.nullKeyString(String value)
    The string used to represent null map keys in Parquet MAP key_value format.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.pageSize(int value)
    Sets the target page size in bytes.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.rowGroupSize(int value)
    Sets the target row group size in bytes.
    ParquetSerializer.Builder
    ParquetSerializer.Builder.writeDatesAsTimestamp(boolean value)
    Sets whether dates are written as TIMESTAMP(MILLIS).
